top_issues.issue: God Object / Large Class: 995-line file with 49 prototype methods spanning authentication, CRUD, query, search, streaming, blob handling, and plugin management — violates SRP, OCP, and GRASP High Cohesion
Divergent Change: the file must be modified for every independent domain concern — OAuth flows, CRUD verbs, query pagination, blob handling, streaming options, and plugin system

Parallel Architecture: an ES6 Connection class (lines 5-18) exists but is never instantiated; the active code in index.js uses a duplicate pre-ES6 prototype-based constructor — DRY violation and unfinished migration (TODO at index.js:23)
Global Mutable Data: the plugins registry (line 17) is a module-level mutable object shared across the entire Node.js process — breaks test isolation and violates DIP
Shotgun Surgery: sandbox/production endpoint selection duplicated across four methods (lines 184, 209, 264, 308) with inconsistent equality operators (== vs ===)
Dead Code: isChunkedEncoding (lines 22-27, 63) is defined and exported but never called anywhere in the codebase — YAGNI violation
Dead Code: nonJsonResponse (lines 2-4, 18) is defined and exported but never called anywhere in the codebase
Hardcoded insecure URL: getVersions() uses http://na1.salesforce.com (line 353) — HTTP not HTTPS, pod-specific, inconsistent with instance_url pattern used everywhere else
Dead Code: getContentVersionBody (lines 514-521) is defined but never routed to by getBody() which calls getContentVersionData instead — unreachable method

Orphaned request-library options: encoding, preambleCRLF, postambleCRLF, and multipart options (lines 38, 55-56, 62-64) are silently ignored by native fetch — multipart upload and gzip appear configured but do not function
